text.title: Business Model Research Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the Business Model Research methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: value-chain-map
step.action: Agent diagrams Suppliers - Product - Customers with cost arrows.
step.decision-gate: If chain is not signed off, STOP.

step.name: revenue-shortlist
step.action: Score 5 archetypes against the chain; pick 2 with one-line reasons for the 3 rejections.

step.name: comparable-harvesting
step.action: WebSearch 3-5 public competitors per archetype; pull pricing pages + 10-K when listed; tag URLs and retrieval dates.

step.name: canvas-fill
step.action: Populate 9 blocks; tag every cell H/S; cite source URL on H cells.
step.decision-gate: Refuse to proceed if any block is empty.

step.name: unit-economics-p-bands
step.action: Compute CAC, LTV (<=60mo), LTV:CAC, payback in P10/P50/P90.

step.name: stress-test-and-verdict
step.action: Run all 5 stress tests at P50; check P10 LTV:CAC >= 1:1; emit viable / viable-with-fixes / not-viable.
step.decision-gate: If verdict = not-viable, propose 2 alternative archetypes and re-loop step 2.
